title: lances penetration symbol and the K R S relationship
display_title: lances penetration symbol and the K R S relationship
wikitext:
[]: lance's penetration symbol and the K-R-S relationship             Quote Post by mehdi_saada » Wed Oct 28, 2015 9:12 am Do people think like myself, that the love relationship between Kaworu Rei and Shinji is most important if the whole scene in EoE is to make sense ? The question was in the beginning "would Asuka have saved the world the same way" but it is not what matters in fact. I got the impression that a lot of people didn't feel that the whole scene, including all the penetration imagery with the Lance, is pointless, without the characters being Kaworu and Shinji, and none others. For sure with Asuka in her Eva(with a S2 engine) and Rei the other side, this idealized penetration would sound ... quite unatural, to say the least. We won't know, but Shinji could as well have lost his mind without K's lovely face appearing. So Asuka would have, because she didn't know at all Kaworu, and she despised Rei. How the hell would she have trusted them, or calmed herself a little bit ? Again, no "what if" in my post, just "what would feel if".

[]:             Quote Post by pwhodges » Wed Oct 28, 2015 9:38 am Would you like to specify what scene you're talking about so that we don't have to guess?

[]:             Quote Post by mehdi_saada » Wed Oct 28, 2015 10:41 am Sorry. It's true there's lot of sex-like scenes in this film ! The scene where Lillith with Rei's face but on eyes encircles Unit01 with both hands, Shinji says with a weak voice "Rei ?!", then Lillith gets eyes, then Shinji shouts to death, then Lillith takes on Kaworu shape, which makes Shinji close his eyes with an orgasmic/ecstatic face and then, the Lance closes to Sho's core and fuses with it, while Sho's loudly sighs like it was really ... contented !

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Wed Oct 28, 2015 2:33 pm mehdi_saada wrote: Sorry. It's true there's lot of sex-like scenes in this film ! The scene where Lillith with Rei's face but on eyes encircles Unit01 with both hands, Shinji says with a weak voice "Rei ?!", then Lillith gets eyes, then Shinji shouts to death, then Lillith takes on Kaworu shape, which makes Shinji close his eyes with an orgasmic/ecstatic face and then, the Lance closes to Sho's core and fuses with it, while Sho's loudly sighs like it was really ... contented !

[]:             Quote Post by mehdi_saada » Wed Oct 28, 2015 4:31 pm I read them. Well, we're free to imagine that somebody else would pop up for Asuka. But : 1) Shinji is not tanged right away, but way after, when they went over the stratosphere. 2) He felt ecstatic, yet he wasn't tanged immediately, whereas other people felt much more fear the moment they got tanged, so Shinji's status is different. 3) there's no proof the Rei and Kaworu we see here, are something else than the actual Rei's and Kaworu's soul themselves, whereas for the other transition guides, it's hard to tell.

[]:             Quote Post by Gob Hobblin » Wed Oct 28, 2015 6:14 pm ...I'm sorry, are you asking about who would appear for each person in order to bring down their AT Fields? It sounds like that's what you're asking, but I'm not sure.

[]:             Quote Post by pwhodges » Wed Oct 28, 2015 6:24 pm mehdi_saada wrote: other people felt much more fear the moment they got tanged
